title: selinum visnaga
intro: Selinum visnaga, also known as Visnaga or Khella, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a vasodilator and a bronchodilator, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The health benefits of Selinum visnaga include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Selinum visnaga is typically prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
